proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `feature_041` is associated with longer `pfs_months`; each one-unit increase in `feature_041` increases mean progression-free survival.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_041
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS pfs_months ~ feature_041: slope=0.176502 months per one-unit increase, p=0, R2=0.586911.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal `feature_025` values are associated with shorter `pfs_months`; each one-level increase in `feature_025` decreases mean progression-free survival.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_025
analyses.result_summary: Simple OLS pfs_months ~ feature_025: slope=-1.189668 months per one-unit increase, p=0, R2=0.123646.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_036=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_036=0`.

analyses.code: Welch mean comparison: pfs_months by feature_036=1 vs 0
analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months was 3.7027 for feature_036=1 (n=27481) versus 5.0547 for feature_036=0 (n=22519); difference=-1.3520 months, p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043=1` and `pfs_months` is smaller among patients with `feature_001=1` than among patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_043 + feature_001 + feature_043:feature_001; binary-by-binary product
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient for feature_043:feature_001 was -1.628773 months (binary-by-binary product), p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `feature_043=1` and `pfs_months` decreases as `feature_029` increases.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_043 + feature_029 + feature_043:feature_029; `feature_029` standardized to one SD; `feature_043` binary
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient for feature_043:feature_029 was -0.409021 months (`feature_029` standardized to one SD; `feature_043` binary), p=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The combined association of `feature_001=1` and `feature_015=1` with `pfs_months` is less negative than the sum of their separate adverse associations.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ feature_001 + feature_015 + feature_001:feature_015; binary-by-binary product
analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient for feature_001:feature_015 was 0.451669 months (binary-by-binary product), p=0.
